title: Kraljevo, Raška — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kraljevo, Raška: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kraljevo is a city in Raška with a population of 68,000. A city in central Serbia on the Ibar River, known for the medieval Žiča Monastery and its railway and industrial significance.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
